song.title: You Fill Me Lord Jesus
song.author: Jonna Neider
song.lyrics: [V1] .G C D Em You fill me Lord Jesus; . C GM7 Em You enlighten my darkness; . D C D C Your life gives me freedom; . Dsus D Your love heals my pain. . C D Em Your name is my treasure; . C G Em Your majesty awes me; .D C D C You’ve filled Lord Jesus, . D G C G Come fill me again. [V2] Let Your north wind blow on me. Let Your Spirit surround me, ‘Til my being is open, Trusting You once again. Then burn and consume me With Your jealous God’s fire ‘Til my heart is obedient, ‘Til my soul You have gained. [V3] I will turn my heart to you; Seal and pledge and consume me. Mingle with me completely; Like the fire in the flame; ‘Til my being is glowing, Your workmanship showing; I will turn my heart to You Again and again.
